criteria.six_block: Agent return includes the required 6-block structure.
criteria.success_flow: Repo evidence includes success-path coverage for research-manager envelope operations.
criteria.expected_failure_branch: Repo evidence includes deterministic fallback/error branch coverage.
criteria.artifact_present: Required CP6 status artifact exists in repo-local docs/research path.
criteria.live_probe: Live capability probe to local Merlin endpoint succeeded.
criteria.live_chain_proof: Live create -> signal -> brief chain completed against local Merlin endpoint.
criteria.gate_verdict: PASS when all required criteria are true; CONDITIONAL_PASS when local evidence is complete but live proof is missing; FAIL when required evidence or artifacts are missing.
